name: Beef Veggie Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frypan, brown ground chuck, onions, carrots, and celery for 15-20 minutes. Drain.
2. Add seasonings, bouillon cubes, grated Parmesan cheese, and eggs. Mix well.
3. Divide the mixture into two equal portions.
4. Place a damp cloth on the counter.
5. Gently lay filo leaves on the towel. Brush with melted butter, sprinkle lightly with bread crumbs, and repeat twice using 2 leaves per layer.
6. Place half of the meat mixture on one long side. Dot with 1 tablespoon butter.
7. Roll up the strudel using the towel and place it on a buttered or Pam-sprayed cooking sheet.
8. Brush with more melted butter and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
9. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes, or until lightly browned. Cool for a few minutes on the cooking sheet.
